sqlQuery.name: EdaStudyMapping
sqlQuery.sql: select dataset_stable_id as dataset_id, study_stable_id as eda_study_id from @VDI_DATASETS_SCHEMA@.userstudydatasetid

sqlQuery.name: OwnerInfo
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT d.dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as owner_name, organization as owner_organization from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d, (select * from public.crosstab( 'select user_id, key, value from @REMOTE_USERACCOUNTS_SCHEMA@account_properties where key = in (''first_name'', ''organization'', ''middle_name'', ''last_name'') order by user_id, key', 'SELECT unnest(ARRAY[''first_name'', ''last_name'', ''middle_name'', ''organization''])') as userinfo ( user_id bigint, first_name varchar(4000), last_name varchar(4000), middle_name varchar(4000), organization varchar(4000)) ) userinfo where d.owner = userinfo.user_id

sqlQuery.name: CoreMetadata
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, owner, type_name, type_version, category, deleted_status, CASE WHEN is_public THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as is_public, accessibility, days_for_approval, TO_CHAR(creation_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as creation_date FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset

sqlQuery.name: DescriptiveMetadata
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, name, summary, description, program_name, project_name, short_attribution, short_name FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_meta

sqlQuery.name: DatasetAlias
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.user_dataset_id) as dataset_id, CONCAT('EDAUD_', d.user_dataset_id) as old_dataset_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.availableuserdatasets d GROUP BY dataset_id,old_dataset_id

sqlQuery.name: PrimaryContact
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT d.dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as primary_contact_name, affiliation as primary_affiliation, email as primary_email, country as primary_country FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset d LEFT JOIN (SELECT CONCAT('EDAUD_', dataset_id) as dataset_id, affiliation, email, country, first_name, last_name, middle_name FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_contact WHERE is_primary is true ) prim on d.dataset_id = prim.dataset_id ORDER BY last_name, first_name

sqlQuery.name: Publications
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, external_id, type, regexp_replace(citation, '\s+<', ' <') AS citation, CASE WHEN is_primary THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as is_primary, CASE WHEN type = 'PubMed' THEN 'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/' || external_id WHEN type = 'DOI' THEN 'https://doi.org/' || external_id ELSE NULL END as url FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_publication ORDER BY is_primary DESC, external_id

sqlQuery.name: Contacts
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, TRIM(COALESCE(first_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(middle_name || ' ', '') || COALESCE(last_name, '')) as contact_name, affiliation, email, country, CASE WHEN is_primary THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as is_primary FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_contact ORDER BY is_primary DESC, last_name, first_name

sqlQuery.name: Organisms
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, organism_type, species, strain FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_organism ORDER BY organism_type, species

sqlQuery.name: HyperLinks
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, url, description FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_hyperlink ORDER BY description

sqlQuery.name: AssociatedFactors
sqlQuery.sql: select CONCAT('EDAUD_', daf.dataset_id) as dataset_id, factor from @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@dataset_associated_factor daf

sqlQuery.name: FundingAwards
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, agency, award_number FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_funding_award ORDER BY agency, award_number

sqlQuery.name: Countries
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, country FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_country ORDER BY country

sqlQuery.name: Species
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, species FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_species ORDER BY species

sqlQuery.name: Outcomes
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, outcome FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_outcome ORDER BY outcome

sqlQuery.name: Characteristics
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, study_design, study_type, participant_ages, sample_year_start, sample_year_end FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_characteristics

sqlQuery.name: Projects
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, project_id FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_project ORDER BY project_id

sqlQuery.name: SampleTypes
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, type FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_sample_type ORDER BY type

sqlQuery.name: ExternalIds
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, 'DOI' as identifier_type, doi as identifier_value FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_doi WHERE doi IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT dataset_id, 'BioProject' as identifier_type, bioproject_id as identifier_value FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_bioproject_id WHERE bioproject_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY identifier_type, identifier_value

sqlQuery.name: LinkedDatasets
sqlQuery.sql: SELECT dataset_id, linked_dataset_id, linked_dataset_type, shares_records FROM @VDI_CONTROL_SCHEMA@.dataset_link ORDER BY linked_dataset_id
